flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mountainland Technical College rose 86% between 2006 and 2008 ($675 → $1.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mountainland Technical College rose 51% between 2008 and 2009 (66.2% → 100.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mountainland Technical College fell 47% between 2006 and 2008 ($2.4k → $1.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mountainland Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5k → 2.8k).
